revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:1 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:1月30日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 1월 30일]][[zh-min-nan:1 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:正月三十]][[zh:正月三十]]
{{Not to be confused with|January 30|qq=January 30}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=一月三十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 1월 30일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar January|qq=}} '''January 30''' is the 30th day of the month {{ill|Zhengyue|en|Zhengyue|qid=Q1072983|lt=January (Mutsuki)|1=Zhengyue}}, the 1st month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11635368}}.
As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar, it sometimes occurs and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> Months are annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big|qq=}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small|qq=}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>
== Events == * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|qid=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1573|en|1573|qid=Q6678|lt=1573|1=1573}} {{ill|March 3|en|March 3|qid=Q2391|lt=March 3|1=March 3}}) – The shōgun, {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshiaki|en|Ashikaga Yoshiaki|qid=Q434415|lt=Ashikaga Yoshiaki|1=Ashikaga Yoshiaki}}, raised an army to campaign against {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|en|Oda Nobunaga|qid=Q171411|lt=Oda Nobunaga|1=Oda Nobunaga}}.
== Births == * [[崇徳]] 3rd year / [[崇禎]] 11th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1638|en|1638|qid=Q6893|lt=1638|1=1638}} {{ill|March 15|en|March 15|qid=Q2403|lt=March 15|1=March 15}}) – {{ill|Shunzhi Emperor|en|Shunzhi Emperor|qid=Q310453|lt=Shunzheng Emperor|1=Shunzhi Emperor}}, the 3rd Emperor of the Qing dynasty (died {{ill|1661|en|1661|qid=Q7005|lt=1661|1=1661}}). * {{ill|Bunsei|en|Bunsei|qid=Q1327119|lt=Bunsei|1=Bunsei}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1823|en|1823|qid=Q6988|lt=1823|1=1823}} {{ill|March 12|en|March 12|qid=Q2402|lt=March 12|1=March 12}}) – {{ill|Katsu Kaishū|en|Katsu Kaishū|qid=Q700470|lt=Katsu Kaishū|1=Katsu Kaishū}}, a key figure in the Tokugawa shogunate as Army Commander and an originator of what became Juntendo University (died {{ill|1899|en|1899|qid=Q7851|lt=1899|1=1899}}).
== Deaths ==
== Commemorations == * 晦日正月
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|1|29|2|1|12|30|2|1|0130|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

{{translated page|ja|1月30日 (旧暦)|version=46618581|comment=Imported full ja history}}

[[ko:음력 1월 30일]] [[ja:1月30日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:正月三十]]
[[ar:January 30 (Lunisolar)]]
<!-- Note: "徳川家斉" is recorded as "閏1月7日" in another source. --> <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:1 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:正月三十]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:1 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:正月三十]] {{wikidata link|Q838953}} [[Category:Days 30 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:Lunisolar January]] [[Category:Shakkō]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
